name: agentic-memory
description: Persistent code, research, and conversation memory for AI coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Search and trace code, research, and conversation memory from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Agentic Memory through a hosted MCP surface optimized for public plugin installs. The public surface exposes bounded read and explicit memory-write tools while keeping local indexing and maintenance operations out of the plugin contract.
defaultPrompt: Search this codebase and related memory for prior work on auth flows
Trace the likely execution path starting from this function
Save this research finding to memory for later retrieval
